name: bithorax_complex_chr3R
description: Bithorax complex (BX-C) at cytological band 89E on chr3R. Contains the posterior Hox genes Ubx, abd-A, Abd-B plus the ~300 kb of cis-regulatory bxd, abx, iab-2..iab-8 infraabdominal domains and the bxd ncRNA. The most thoroughly dissected cis-regulatory landscape in animal genetics.
